title: Melted Scottish Tobiko Bake
description: A resinous and chewy Scottish dish perfect for a lazy Sunday, featuring tobiko, brine-wet, and low-carb friendly ingredients.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch round baking dish with butter.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the scrambled eggs, salt, and a pinch of black pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese, grated cheddar cheese, and chopped fresh dill.
Arrange the brine-cured salmon slices in the prepared baking dish.
Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the salmon.
Pour the beaten egg mixture over the cream cheese mixture.
Top with tobiko and sprinkle with black pepper.
Dot the top with the unsalted butter.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the eggs are set and the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with almond flour.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the almond flour is lightly toasted.
